title: A Strong Community Role
article_text: This is a true story about a girl in our community. She is not strong, but she wants to help others. Maybe she can join a particular group with a special role. The group has a design for a health event. Please take a step and eat well for a difference in your condition. Sometimes the action to rise early is difficult for her. For more detail, she can use her phone to call me. They themselves can learn from each other. There is no else like her in the group. I see a clear difference in her health now.

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'having a lot of physical power'?
What is the English word for 'зӨҫеҢә'?
Which word means 'to become a member of a group'?
What is the Chinese meaning of 'difficult'?
Which word means 'a small piece of information'?

image_prompts: A young girl sitting on a bench in a park, looking thoughtful, with a speech bubble saying 'This is a true story'.
The same girl trying to lift a heavy box but struggling, with a caption 'She is not strong'.
The girl walking towards a group of people holding a sign that says 'Join Us', with a question mark above her head.
A table with a large paper showing a design for a health fair, with the words 'Health Event'.
A person taking a step forward on a path, with a plate of vegetables on one side and a person looking healthier on the other side.
A girl waking up in bed early in the morning, looking tired, with a clock showing 5 AM and a thought bubble saying 'This is difficult'.
A girl holding a phone to her ear, with a speech bubble showing 'Call me for detail'.
Two people sitting together, each pointing at a book, with a caption 'They learn from each other'.
A group of people with one person highlighted and a note saying 'No one else like her'.
The same girl now smiling and running, with a chart showing her health improving over time.
